mixes.title: Between Worlds
mixes.excerpt: A 65-minute journey through the space between day and night, thought and feeling.
mixes.description: Between Worlds is a carefully sequenced melodic house and techno set from 9bitts — made for the hour when the day has not decided what it is yet. Press play and stay until the end.

mixes.title: A Tiny Home in the Universe
mixes.excerpt: Ten tracks — contemplative open, anthemic middle, etheric close.
mixes.description: The first numbered 9bitts set. Melodic techno chosen one track at a time — a contemplative open, an anthemic middle, and an etheric close.

mixes.title: Midnight Sessions
mixes.excerpt: From melodic light to techno dark — a journey through the night.
mixes.description: Midnight Sessions moves from melodic light into techno dark. A full-night journey for deep listening.

mixes.title: Dusk Sessions
mixes.excerpt: Quieter, more spacious — made for the hours when light is leaving.
mixes.description: Dusk Sessions is the quieter half of the day — spacious melodic techno for the hours when light is leaving.

mixes.title: Sunrise Sessions
mixes.excerpt: Slow opens, bright melodics, long breath. For when light is arriving.
mixes.description: Sunrise Sessions opens slowly — bright melodics and long breath for the hours when light is arriving.

mixes.title: Charlotte de Witte Tribute
mixes.excerpt: A raw techno tribute mix — edited by 9bitts.
mixes.description: A raw techno tribute to Charlotte de Witte — edited and sequenced by 9bitts.

mixes.title: A Tribute to Passenger 10
mixes.excerpt: Melodic progressive house — a deep tribute to one of the genre's finest.
mixes.description: A melodic progressive house tribute to Passenger 10 — deep, careful, and made to be heard in full.
